title: Admin Dashboards for Crypto Digital Stores: A Step-by-Step Setup Guide — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text:
You've spent months building your digital product, but when it comes to selling, you're stuck with a PayPal account that's been frozen or a Stripe account that's been shut down due to 'suspicious activity.' You're not alone. As a digital creator in Ethiopia, you're forced to navigate a complex web of banking restrictions and Know-Your-Customer (KYC) requirements that make it impossible to get paid through traditional payment processors. You're left with two options: give up on your business or find a way to bypass the system. But what if you could sell your digital products without relying on PayPal or Stripe? What if you could get paid instantly, without any hassle or bureaucratic red tape?"

    { "heading": "Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The reason why traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe don't work for you is because they have strict KYC requirements that make it difficult for creators in countries with restricted banking systems to get verified. This means that even if you have a legitimate business, you may be prevented from accessing your earnings due to 'suspicious activity' or 'high-risk' designation. But what if you could bypass this entire process and sell your digital products directly to your customers without any intermediaries?
What You Need Before You Start

To set up your own crypto digital store, you'll need a few things: a digital product to sell, a payment processor that accepts cryptocurrencies, and a way to deliver your product to customers. You'll also need a basic understanding of how blockchain technology works and how to use a cryptocurrency wallet. Don't worry if you're new to all this – we'll walk you through each step of the process. First, let's get started with setting up your payment and delivery pipeline.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, you'll need to integrate a payment gateway that accepts cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, or USDT. You can use a service like NOWPayments, which allows you to accept over 300 different cryptocurrencies without any KYC requirements. Once you've set up your payment gateway, you'll need to configure your delivery pipeline to automatically send your digital product to customers once payment has been received. This is where our Admin Dashboard comes in – it provides a user-friendly interface for managing your transactions, orders, and customer data.
Don't let banking restrictions hold you back from selling your digital products – with Unchained Commerce, you can bypass traditional payment processors and get paid instantly.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Now that you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live and start selling your digital products. To do this, you'll need to create a sales page or website that showcases your products and integrates with your payment gateway. You can use a platform like Unchained Commerce to help you get started. Once you've set up your sales page, you can start promoting your products to your customers and waiting for your first sale to come in. Remember to track your analytics and adjust your strategy as needed to optimize your sales.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Once you've made your first sale, it's time to start scaling your business. This means increasing your sales, marketing efforts, and product offerings to reach a wider audience. To do this, you'll need to continue to monitor your analytics and adjust your strategy as needed. You may also want to consider using additional tools and services to help you optimize your sales and customer engagement. With the right approach, you can turn your digital product business into a successful and sustainable venture.
How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments?

What if I told you that you can sell your digital products without relying on PayPal or Stripe? With our Admin Dashboard, you can set up a crypto digital store that accepts over 300 different cryptocurrencies and bypasses traditional payment processors. This means you can get paid instantly, without any hassle or bureaucratic red tape.
With our Admin Dashboard, you can set up a crypto digital store that accepts over 300 different cryptocurrencies and reaches a global audience.

Your Action Checklist

To set up your crypto digital store, follow these concrete action steps:   1. Choose a digital product to sell and prepare it for delivery.  2. Set up a payment gateway that accepts cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ethereum, or USDT.  3. Configure your delivery pipeline to automatically send your digital product to customers once payment has been received.  4. Create a sales page or website that showcases your products and integrates with your payment gateway.  5. Promote your products to your customers and track your analytics to optimize your sales.  6. Continue to monitor your analytics and adjust your strategy as needed to scale your business.
By using blockchain technology and cryptocurrency payments, you can create a successful and sustainable digital product business that bypasses traditional payment processors.
